name: pitchfork
description: Pitchfork — freelance OS: discover leads, audit websites, pitch, close, get paid.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
